data.title: ADA's price may surge to $1.25 as indicated by 3 charts and various indicators, showing a potential rally ahead.
data.description: Various technical analysis tools and on-chain metrics have indicated a potential price surge for Cardano, pointing towards a target of $1.25 in the near future.

data.title: Investors eye $500 monthly income from PepsiCo stock amidst company's financial struggles, activist investor presence.
data.description: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ: PEP) is currently facing financial challenges as its stock closed slightly lower on Thursday amidst market shifts and the presence of activist investor Elliott Investment Management. The company is grappling with increased debt and weak cash flow, leading to concerns about its financial health. Analyst Peter Grom from UBS has maintained a Buy rating for PepsiCo but lowered the price target from $175 to $170 on Sept. 11. The company's dividends are now being seen as a possible source of consistent monthly income for astute investors as they navigate through the uncertainty. The arrival of the activist investor is not expected to offer an immediate solution to PepsiCo's struggles. For more details, you can refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Uranium Energy Corp. (NYSE: UEC) expected to report Q4 loss of 4 cents/share and revenue of $17 million. Stock rose 0.2% to $12.26.
data.description: Uranium Energy Corp. (NYSE: UEC) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Wednesday, Sept. 24th. Analysts are predicting a quarterly loss of 4 cents per share for the Corpus Christi, Texas-based company. It is expected to report quarterly revenue of $17 million. In the third quarter, Uranium Energy reported a loss of 7 cents per share, compared to a loss of 5 cents per share in the same period last year. The company's shares closed at $12.26, with a 0.2% increase. For more information and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Tensordyne from Silicon Valley achieved IDCA G2 certification after passing SDS evaluation for its AI platform.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California on September 19, 2025, the International Data Center Authority (IDCA) announced that Tensordyne has obtained the G2 certification level. This was achieved following the completion of the SDS evaluation process for its enterprise AI platform. This certification signifies Tensordyne's commitment to meeting high standards in system, design, and service protocols.
Fed's Kashkari ends comments on CNBC.

data.title: Stock futures are steady with Dow -0.01%, S&P 500 0.01%, Nasdaq 100 0.03%, Russell 2000 0.01%. Markets are optimistic post Trump-Xi call with focus on technology investments and TikTok deal, Federal Reserve likely to cut interest rates in October. Economic indicators positive, with jobless claims declining and manufacturing index rising in September.
data.description: U.S. stock futures were volatile on Friday, reacting to news of China banning tech firms from purchasing Nvidia chips, with futures of major benchmark indices mixed. President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping were set to discuss a TikTok deal. Treasury bonds had a 10-year yield of 4.12% and 2-year bond at 3.57%. Federal Reserve likely to cut interest rates in October, with markets showing 91.9% probability. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust down 0.074% at $661.79, Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose 0.23% to $596.69. Most S&P 500 sectors closed positively on Thursday, led by tech stocks after Nvidia's investment in Intel. Economic data showed a decline in jobless claims and rise in Philadelphia Fed Manufacturing Index. Dow Jones ended 0.27% higher.

data.title: Donato Giorgio, President Global Supply Chain, leaving Essity's Executive Management Team after 16 years.
data.description: In an announcement made on September 19, 2025, Donato Giorgio, the President of Global Supply Chain and a member of the Executive Management Team at Essity, will be departing the company. Having been with Essity since 2009, Giorgio has served in multiple leadership roles across the company's global manufacturing and supply chain divisions. This development marks a significant change within Essity's leadership structure, as Giorgio's tenure of over 15 years comes to a close.

data.title: Mega Matrix Inc. purchases $6 million worth of ENA tokens to reinforce stablecoin governance tokens strategy.
data.description: In Singapore on September 19, 2025, Mega Matrix Inc. (NYSE American: MPU) disclosed its strategic acquisition totaling about $6 million in ENA tokens. This includes a recent purchase of $3 million, based on the past 1-day Volume-Weighted Average Price (VWAP).

data.title: Tinggly & The Knot partner, offering experiential gifts like "Just Married" box. Partnership announced on Sept 19, 2025 in NYC.
data.description: Tinggly, a top experiential gift provider, has launched a strategic alliance with The Knot, a prominent all-in-one wedding planning platform. The collaboration introduces exclusive gift collections like the "Just Married" box, designed for newlyweds seeking memorable experiences. The partnership, announced in New York on September 19, 2025, is poised to enhance the wedding industry by providing access to unique and unforgettable experiences. This partnership showcases Tinggly's commitment to innovation in the gifting sector, offering couples a chance to create lasting memories.
